name: Install ACME Cert Renewal
description: Deploys an on-start hook that handles ACME certificate issuance and renewal via acme.sh with Cloudflare DNS. The hook lives in /etc/proxvex/on_start.d/ and runs on every container start (and once now via hook_trigger_now).

commands.description: Deploy ACME renewal on-start hook (runs at deploy + every container start)
